rationale: The citing paper note focuses on ABM-based WOM diffusion and freemium conversion forecasting (Bass/complex contagion, calibration, targeting/rewards), while the cited paper note is a conjoint study of buyer–vendor–supplier triadic channel ties in complex B2B products. There is no provided in-text citation context linking this cited work to the citing paper’s models, data, or evaluation, and the match evidence is only a bare DOI reference entry. Given this strong topical/method mismatch and lack of substantive-use evidence, this looks like an incidental/background mention.
